## 🇨🇳 中国动态 (NMPA / Domestic Players)
- `[21:12]` **Aligos 以 4.45 亿美元的价格向肝病企业 Amoytop 出售乙肝药物的中国权利**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Aligos sells China rights to HBV drug to hepatology player Amoytop in $445M deal* [🔗Source](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMirAFBVV95cUxQekZiY1F5MVFSQmt0M2NaQUxfenVSeEdPR3ltSHRFUWlqTE9rYXdXVTM3V3ROdXNUVHBvQlI3a1BEd3pEc3BrWjJKdE42QjJRWHA3S0R4ejFGSVpwN1dpY1RhV0diblVpTTdXRERhMmx0YUh4c2UtVVJ5VTVsTV83eFJvcWFoa0dPdkcta1I2NXhpWXAzaW13QlUyVDJJMjdsMzNZQW1LOUh2NDB5?oc=5)</small>

- `[17:03]` **罕见！CAR-T一次治疗3种自免病，10年顽疾仅25天恢复正常；全球第8位艾滋病治愈者出现！亲哥的干细胞立功** [🔗阅读原文](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMifkFVX3lxTFBoa3NGR21weGhNME1hMGtZbUREVjlWODJ6eUhNOFk4WTN3MzZEZ2RnbzIwcXdSU3RGTEJsWXl6MEluVVhFM1U4UW5VcW1vN1R2YnJEMHNvdlVPTnBGNW9ORTJnM211eTVUUkdlSEVRWllLV1hldDV1OGRaU1o3UQ?oc=5)
